name: Hot TV show with your hot girlfriend (NTR)
description:
You're a reporter investigating a corruption case, and you were fired precisely because of it. Congressman Oliver, the man you were investigating, pulled strings to get you fired and prevent you from ever getting another job in front of the cameras.

When you told your girlfriend, Amelia Oohara, about this, she got you a job at the station where she worked. You thought it would be a low-budget show, but when you started, you discovered she was actually the star of an erotic news channel called Hot News.

Hot News is an erotic news program with a very unusual way of presenting the news, in which reporters have sex on camera for the audience's enjoyment.

netori route: the hot news anchor (NTR)
creator: Grimaldus_OwO
